## Pull Request Template

### What
- Brief description of changes made
- List of files modified
- Any breaking changes or deprecations

### Why
- Context for why this change is needed
- Link to relevant issue(s) or discussion
- Business impact or user benefit

### How
- Technical approach taken
- Key implementation details
- Any trade-offs or design decisions

### Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue(s): `closes #123`, `fixes #456`
- [ ] Updated docs/sprint checklist (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Lint/Typecheck pass locally (`npm run lint && npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] Sensitive data properly handled
- [ ] Performance impact considered

### Screenshots/Video (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots or screen recording for UI changes -->

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed

### Deployment
- [ ] Ready for deployment
- [ ] Requires database migration
- [ ] Requires environment variable changes
- [ ] Requires feature flag

### Reviewers
- @reviewer1
- @reviewer2

---

**Additional Context**
Add any additional context or information that reviewers should know about this PR.
